info.name: Medical Backend API
info.description: Complete API collection for Medical Backend with all endpoints, DTOs, and response examples

request.description:
Register a new admin user

Request Body:
- fullLegalName: string (max 200 chars) - REQUIRED
- medicalEmail: string (valid email, max 320 chars) - REQUIRED
- professionalRole: string (max 150 chars) - REQUIRED
- password: string (6-72 chars) - REQUIRED
- forgetPassword: boolean - REQUIRED (must be false)

Response: { id, fullLegalName, medicalEmail, professionalRole, role, createdAt }

Authenticate and get JWT token

Request Body:
- email: string (valid email) - REQUIRED
- password: string (minimum 6 chars) - REQUIRED

Response: { access_token, user }

Send OTP to email for password reset

Request Body:
- email: string (valid email) - REQUIRED

Response: { message, statusCode }

Verify OTP for password reset

Request Body:
- email: string (valid email) - REQUIRED
- otp: string (exactly 6 chars) - REQUIRED

Response: { message, statusCode }

Reset password after OTP verification

Request Body:
- email: string (valid email) - REQUIRED
- password: string (minimum 6 chars) - REQUIRED
- forgetPassword: boolean - REQUIRED (must be true)

Response: { message, statusCode }

Get list of all users (Admin only)

Headers: Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}} - REQUIRED
Query Params: None

Response: { users array with id, fullLegalName, medicalEmail, professionalRole, role, createdAt }

Update admin email (Admin only)

Headers:
- Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}} - REQUIRED
- Content-Type: application/json

Request Body:
- newEmail: string (valid email) - REQUIRED

Response: { message, statusCode }

Change admin password (Admin only)

Headers:
- Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}} - REQUIRED
- Content-Type: application/json

Request Body:
- currentPassword: string - REQUIRED
- newPassword: string (minimum 8 chars) - REQUIRED

Response: { message, statusCode }

Create a new product category (Admin only)

Headers:
- Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}} - REQUIRED
- Content-Type: application/json

Request Body:
- name: string (max 120 chars) - REQUIRED

Response: { id, name, createdAt }

Create a new product (Admin only)

Headers:
- Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}} - REQUIRED
- Content-Type: application/json

Request Body:
- name: string (max 200 chars) - REQUIRED
- clinicalDescription: string - REQUIRED
- clinicalBenefits: array of objects (min 1) - REQUIRED
  - icon: string
  - title: string
  - description: string
- technicalSpecifications: array of objects (min 1) - REQUIRED
  - name: string
  - value: string
- categoryId: UUID - REQUIRED
- actualPrice: string (numeric) - OPTIONAL
- offerPrice: string (numeric) - OPTIONAL
- sku: string (max 80) - OPTIONAL
- stockQuantity: integer - OPTIONAL
- lowStockAlert: integer - OPTIONAL
- isActive: boolean - OPTIONAL
- tags: string array - OPTIONAL
- images: string array - OPTIONAL
- frequentlyBoughtTogether: UUID array - OPTIONAL
- bundleUpsells: UUID array - OPTIONAL
- frontendBadges: enum array - OPTIONAL
- bulkPriceTiers: array of objects - OPTIONAL
  - minQty: integer (min 1)
  - price: string (numeric)

Response: { id, name, categoryId, clinicalDescription, sku, stockQuantity, isActive, createdAt }

response.name: Success
response.body:
{
  "message": "Product created successfully",
  "statusCode": 201,
  "data": {
    "id": "750e8400-e29b-41d4-a716-446655440005",
    "name": "Surgical Scalpel Set",
    "categoryId": "650e8400-e29b-41d4-a716-446655440001",
    "clinicalDescription": "Professional stainless steel surgical scalpel set for general surgery",
    "sku": "SS-SCALPEL-SET-001",
    "stockQuantity": 100,
    "isActive": true,
    "createdAt": "2026-03-01T11:00:00Z"
  }
}

request.description:
List all products with pagination and filtering (Admin only)

Headers: Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}} - REQUIRED

Query Parameters:
- page: integer (min 1) - OPTIONAL (default: 1)
- limit: integer (min 1, max 100) - OPTIONAL (default: 10)
- search: string - OPTIONAL (search by product name)
- category: string - OPTIONAL (filter by category name or "All")
- tab: enum (all, active, out_of_stock, low_stock) - OPTIONAL (default: all)

Response: { products array, total, page, limit }

Update product details (Admin only)

Headers:
- Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}} - REQUIRED
- Content-Type: application/json

Path Parameters:
- id: UUID - REQUIRED

Request Body (all fields optional):
- name: string (max 200 chars)
- clinicalDescription: string
- categoryId: UUID
- tags: string array
- actualPrice: string (numeric)
- offerPrice: string (numeric)
- bulkPriceTiers: array of objects
  - minQty: integer (min 1)
  - price: string (numeric)
- sku: string (max 80)
- stockQuantity: integer (min 0)
- lowStockAlert: integer (min 0)
- isActive: boolean
- clinicalBenefits: array of objects
- technicalSpecifications: array of objects

Response: { message, statusCode }

Create a new faculty member (Admin only)

Headers:
- Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}} - REQUIRED
- Content-Type: application/json

Request Body:
- firstName: string - REQUIRED
- lastName: string - REQUIRED
- phoneNumber: string - REQUIRED
- email: string (valid email) - REQUIRED
- npiNumber: string (exactly 10 chars) - REQUIRED
- assignedRole: string - REQUIRED
- imageUrl: string - OPTIONAL
- primaryClinicalRole: string - OPTIONAL
- medicalDesignation: string - OPTIONAL
- institutionOrHospital: string - OPTIONAL

Response: { id, firstName, lastName, email, npiNumber, createdAt }

List all faculty members with pagination and search (Admin only)

Headers: Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}} - REQUIRED

Query Parameters:
- q: string - OPTIONAL (search by name or email)
- page: integer - OPTIONAL (default: 1)
- limit: integer - OPTIONAL (default: 10)

Response: { faculty array, total, page, limit }

Create a new facility/location (Admin only)

Headers:
- Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}} - REQUIRED
- Content-Type: application/json

Request Body:
- name: string (max 200 chars) - REQUIRED
- address: string (max 400 chars) - REQUIRED

Response: { id, name, address, createdAt }

response.name: Success
Success

request.description:
Create a new workshop (Admin only)

Headers:
- Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}} - REQUIRED
- Content-Type: application/json

Request Body:
- deliveryMode: enum (in_person, online) - REQUIRED
- title: string (max 220 chars) - REQUIRED
- facilityId: UUID - REQUIRED
- capacity: integer (min 1) - REQUIRED
- alertAt: integer (min 0) - REQUIRED
- registrationDeadline: string (date YYYY-MM-DD) - REQUIRED
- shortBlurb: string - OPTIONAL
- coverImageUrl: string - OPTIONAL
- learningObjectives: string - OPTIONAL
- offersCmeCredits: boolean - REQUIRED
- cmeCreditsInfo: string - OPTIONAL
- days: array of objects - OPTIONAL
  - date: string (YYYY-MM-DD)
  - dayNumber: integer (min 1)
  - segments: array of objects
    - segmentNumber: integer (min 1)
    - courseTopic: string (max 220 chars)
    - topicDetails: string
    - startTime: string (HH:MM AM/PM)
    - endTime: string (HH:MM AM/PM)
- groupDiscounts: array of objects - OPTIONAL
  - minimumAttendees: integer (min 1)
  - groupRatePerPerson: string (numeric)

Response: { id, title, deliveryMode, capacity, facilityId, createdAt }

response.name: Success

request.description:
List workshops with advanced filtering (Admin only)

Headers: Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}} - REQUIRED

Query Parameters (all optional):
- q: string (search by title)
- facilityId: UUID
- facultyId: UUID (filter by faculty member)
- deliveryMode: enum (in_person, online)
- offersCmeCredits: string (true, false)
- groupDiscountEnabled: string (true, false)
- page: integer (default: 1)
- limit: integer (max 50, default: 10)
- sortBy: enum (createdAt, title) (default: createdAt)
- sortOrder: enum (asc, desc) (default: desc)

Response: { workshops array, total, page, limit }

response.name: Success
